_note: Team news for every fixture within 72 hours, discovered directly from the canonical fixture feed so a newly generated Best Pick is already covered. The automatic collector searches two free RSS indexes, retains article URL/publisher/time as evidence, and changes out/doubt only after two independent publishers corroborate an explicit player-status claim. One-source and vague reports are recorded but cannot alter the model. Manual official/confirmed entries and confirmed lineups are preserved. 'checked' is written only when both searches succeeded; sanity_check fails an imminent publish when news is missing or stale. Run: python -m scripts.sync_team_news.
